headline: Toll Brothers Stock Could Lead Homebuilder Rebound as Housing Stabilizes
summary: Toll Brothers is outperforming peers like Lennar, D.R. Horton, and PulteGroup as homebuilder stocks show signs of stabilizing despite ongoing headwinds.

headline: Social, Active, Connected: New Survey from Del Webb Reveals How Active Adults Can Thrive in an Increasingly Lonely World
summary: ATLANTA, April 06, 2026--At a time when loneliness has become a growing concern for adults, there is a silver lining: a new survey shows that where and how you live can contribute to higher rates of connectedness and satisfaction.
